titles.title: solve_nivp: A Python toolkit for integrating nonsmooth dynamical systems

institution.institution_name: IMSIA (UMR 9219), CNRS, EDF, CEA, ENSTA Paris, Institut Polytechnique de Paris, Palaiseau, France
IMSIA (UMR 9219), CNRS, EDF, CEA, ENSTA Paris, Institut Polytechnique de Paris, Palaiseau, France

citation.volume_title: Nonsmooth mechanics: Models, dynamics and control
citation.author: Brogliato
citation.unstructured_citation: Brogliato, B. (2016). Nonsmooth mechanics: Models, dynamics and control (3rd ed.). Springer. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-28664-8

citation.article_title: On the complicated price dynamics of a simple one-dimensional discontinuous financial market model with heterogeneous interacting traders
citation.author: Tramontana
citation.unstructured_citation: Tramontana, F., Westerhoff, F., & Gardini, L. (2010). On the complicated price dynamics of a simple one-dimensional discontinuous financial market model with heterogeneous interacting traders. Journal of Economic Behavior & Organization, 74(3), 187–205. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jebo.2010.02.008

citation.author: Gabriel
citation.unstructured_citation: Gabriel, S. A., Conejo, A. J., Fuller, J. D., Hobbs, B. F., & Ruiz, C. (2012). Complementarity modeling in energy markets (Vol. 180). Springer Science & Business Media.

citation.article_title: An implicit time-stepping scheme for rigid body dynamics with inelastic collisions and Coulomb friction
citation.author: Stewart
citation.journal_title: International Journal for Numerical Methods in Engineering
citation.unstructured_citation: Stewart, D. E., & Trinkle, J. C. (1996). An implicit time-stepping scheme for rigid body dynamics with inelastic collisions and Coulomb friction. International Journal for Numerical Methods in Engineering, 39(15), 2673–2691. https://doi.org/10.1002/(SICI)1097-0207(19960815)39:15<2673::AID-NME972>3.0.CO;2-I

citation.author: Hindmarsh

citation.article_title: SciPy 1.0: Fundamental algorithms for scientific computing in Python
citation.author: Virtanen
citation.unstructured_citation: Virtanen, P., Gommers, R., Oliphant, T. E., Haberland, M., Reddy, T., Cournapeau, D., Burovski, E., Peterson, P., Weckesser, W., Bright, J., & others. (2020). SciPy 1.0: Fundamental algorithms for scientific computing in Python. Nature Methods, 17(3), 261–272.

citation.article_title: Reinforcement learning-based adaptive time-integration for nonsmooth dynamics
citation.author: Riley

citation.article_title: A nonsmooth version of Newton’s method
citation.author: Qi
citation.unstructured_citation: Qi, L., & Sun, J. (1993). A nonsmooth version of Newton’s method. Mathematical Programming, 58(1), 353–367.

citation.author: Uzawa
citation.journal_title: Studies in linear and nonlinear programming
